title: In 27 countries, more than 50% of people have never sent a text message
subtitle: Share of respondents who have never sent a text message through a mobile phone (SMS, text message or through a messaging app)
source: The Global Findex Database (2025), indicator: [con16] "Can send a text message on a mobile phone (%, age 15+)".
visdescription: Horizontal pictogram/heatmap showing the 27 countries where more than 50% of people report to have never sent a text message: Chad, Niger, Guinea, India, Benin, Ethiopia, Bangladesh, Burkina Faso, Mali, Pakistan, Madagascar, Sierra Leone, Republic of Congo, Nepal, Comoros, Liberia, Mozambique, Democratic Republic of Congo, Philippines, Cambodia, Malawi, The Gambia, Togo, Lao PDR, Sri Lanka, Egypt, Tajikistan.

_meta.approvalNote: hand layouts; coverage_map is ranked-bars proxy not Mapbox
